_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform cybersecurity testing of developed applications and/or systems.
reference_document_element_description: Execute security testing for AI systems prior to production deployment, including adversarial robustness testing, prompt injection testing, and supply chain verification.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.546), SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.525).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.630). Shared vocabulary: [systems, testing]. DCWF-only terms [applications, cybersecurity, developed, perform] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, chain, deployment, execute, injection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.896 (P=0.910, R=0.883). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Perform cybersecurity testing of developed applications and/or systems." and "Execute security testing for AI systems prior to production deployment, includin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.557 < STS 0.630 (gap -0.072). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [applications, cybersecurity, developed] and [adversarial, ai, chain] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [systems, testing]. DCWF-only: [applications, cybersecurity, developed, perform]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, chain, deployment, execute, injection].
